text:
DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 - Welcome to West City Trailer
Step into West City in AGE 1000 and gear up for your next big adventure.

Watch the latest DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 footage and prepare for the ultimate battle experience.

#DBXV3 launches on XBOX Series X|S in 2027.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dragon-ball-xenoverse-3/9N30KLM8JP2S/0010

Dive into the newest look at DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3, packed with fresh story details and the first-ever gameplay reveals.

As you step into life as both a Great Saiya Squad and a West City University student, a new era of battles and choices unfolds.

Stay tuned for more updates.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Age of Empires Mobile: PC Edition
Built for mobile, optimized for PC.

Age of Empires Mobile: PC Edition combines familiar fast-paced Age of Empires Mobile elements with an optimized PC experience built for the precision of mouse and keyboard.  

Command civilizations, optimize your economy, and rally friends to forge powerful alliances and outmaneuver rivals  through robust social features that turn every battle into a shared conquest. 

Play Now!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Give Us A Sign - Official Announcement Trailer
YOUR VOICE IS THE KEY... AND THE TRIGGER. 🎙️

Every investigation has a price.

Give Us A Sign is a 1-4 player co-op paranormal investigation horror game where your microphone can become your greatest liability. Explore haunted locations, uncover the truth behind terrifying entities, and survive a world that listens to every word you say.

• Voice-reactive gameplay
• Dynamic paranormal encounters
• Deep investigation systems
• 20+ unique lore-driven ghosts
• Reactive environments & modular scares

Coming to XBOX Series X|S
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/give-us-a-sign/9n0v23pttr50

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Deer & Boy - Launch Trailer
Some adventures stay with you forever, and Deer & Boy is one of them. Available NOW on XBOX Series X|S 💫 

Play here: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/deer-boy/9nh79h1pvq04

🦌 Guide a boy and his deer through a hand-crafted world
🫂 Follow a story about the bond between them
🧠 Solve challenges integrated into your journey
 
🦌 What is DEER & BOY about?
Deer & Boy is a narrative cinematic adventure that tells a silent story through stunning visuals and evocative music. In this poetic cinematic platformer, a runaway boy meets a fawn. As their bond grows, so do their abilities and the emotional weight of their journey, where silence speaks louder than words.
 
Deer & Boy is developed by Lifeline Games and published by Dear Villagers.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Frostpunk 2: Breach of Trust | Launch Trailer
"No fire, no frost, shall drive us apart."

But trust? That fractures easily. As New Edinburgh burns and Aurora watches from across the frozen lake, negotiations become your only weapon. Will you unite the scattered remnants of humanity, or will you bend them to your will?

Breach of Trust, new scenario expansion for Frostpunk 2, launches June 23rd on XBOX Series X|S.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/frostpunk-2-breach-of-trust/9P0DX8F4KH78
